shuffle.name: Shuffle
shuffle.description: Confuses an enemy, causing it to sometimes attack itself.

healing_jig.name: Healing Jig
healing_jig.description: A joyful dance that restores 40 HP.

wild_card.name: Wild Card
wild_card.description: Strikes all enemies and applies a random status effect.

puppet_strike.name: Puppet Strike
puppet_strike.description: Attacks and reduces the target's ATK.

shadow_web.name: Shadow Web
shadow_web.description: Wraps all enemies in shadow, dealing moderate damage to each.

void_drain.name: Void Drain
void_drain.description: Drains HP from target and transfers it to Gloam.

marionette.name: Marionette
marionette.description: Takes full control of an enemy for one turn.

acrobatic_strike.name: Acrobatic Strike
acrobatic_strike.description: A precise strike that always hits. Ignores 25% of defense.

aerial_assault.name: Aerial Assault
aerial_assault.description: A devastating leap attack that ignores 50% of defense.

evasive_roll.name: Evasive Roll
evasive_roll.description: Dramatically increases evasion for one turn.

pinwheel.name: Pinwheel
pinwheel.description: Spins into all enemies twice. Each hit is separate.

shadow_pounce.name: Shadow Pounce
shadow_pounce.description: Leaps from the shadows for heavy damage.

arcane_burst.name: Arcane Burst
arcane_burst.description: Releases a burst of arcane energy.

mystic_roar.name: Mystic Roar
mystic_roar.description: A roar that slows all party members.

inferno_roar.name: Inferno Roar
inferno_roar.description: A fiery roar that damages the entire party.

lightning_strike.name: Lightning Strike
lightning_strike.description: A bolt of lightning. High speed.

storm_dash.name: Storm Dash
storm_dash.description: Dashes through twice at high speed.

frost_breath.name: Frost Breath
frost_breath.description: May freeze the target solid for one turn.

blizzard_roar.name: Blizzard Roar
blizzard_roar.description: Chills all party members, reducing their speed.
